description: Refactor the current action model from simple string-to-MouseButtonKind mapping to a richer Action enum that can represent: single click, double click, key press, key combo (modifier+key), and mouse+key combos. The action enum needs to be serializable for persistence and displayable for the UI. Update ALL_ACTIONS to be extensible rather than a fixed slice. The poll_callback button dispatch needs to handle actions that involve timing (double-click) or multiple events (combos).
title: Action system refactor
